_comment: Local overrides — this file is gitignored. Do not commit.

_overrides.model: Override the project model. Example: 'claude-opus-4-6' for complex tasks.
_overrides.permissions.allow: Add patterns to allow locally that are denied at project level.
_overrides.permissions.deny: Add extra deny patterns specific to your local environment.
_overrides.experimentalAgentTeams: Set to false to disable agent teams locally if causing issues.
